hero.title: Leadership & Global Presence
hero.subtitle: Meet the people and the global network behind PVCON — driving pharmacovigilance excellence across 100+ countries and 6 continents.

ceo.name: Moin Don
ceo.title: President & CEO, Founder
ceo.message: With over 50 years in pharma, I founded PVCON to bridge regulatory expectations with real-world pharmacovigilance. I’ve held leadership roles at Sanofi Aventis, Dr. Reddy’s, and served as Regional PV QA Director (APAC) at Johnson & Johnson.
ceo.message2: PVCON is recognized for PV auditing, quality assurance, and training. I serve as Lead of the South Asia Chapter for ISoP and advisor to India’s DCGI and CDSCO, with a continued focus on regulatory excellence and patient safety.
credentials: Pharma Ratan 2016 Award — Lifetime Achievement in Drug Safety & PV
Certified Lead Auditor — Trained in USA, Germany, France & Singapore
Lead, South Asia Chapter — International Society of Pharmacovigilance (ISoP)
Co-author, India's National Pharmacovigilance Program Protocol
Member, Central Advisory Committee — DIA India

globalPresence.heading: Our Global Presence
globalPresence.subtitle: From our headquarters in Mumbai (India), PVCON serves clients across the globe — delivering GxP audits, pharmacovigilance consulting, and regulatory support wherever our partners need us.

team.heading: PVCON  Team
team.subtitle: We are a team of seasoned pharmacovigilance professionals with over 300+ man-years of experience across global regulatory landscapes.

moin-don.name: Moin Don
moin-don.bio: 50+ years of pharmaceutical expertise; former Regional PV QA Director at Johnson & Johnson, APac; Certified Lead Auditor; Adjunct Professor at Jamia Hamdard University; Lead of the South Asia Chapter for ISoP; Co-author of India's National Pharmacovigilance Program Protocol; Member of DIA India’s Central Advisory Committee and Pharma Ratan 2016 Award recipient for Lifetime Achievement in Drug Safety & PV.

rameez-don.name: Rameez Don
rameez-don.bio: 15+ years of professional experience across pharmacovigilance, quality assurance, audits, training, and business development. Certified Lead Auditor, pursuing PhD in Pharmaceutical Management from IIHMR University. Member of the RQA.

nazrul-khan.name: Nazrul Khan
nazrul-khan.bio: 24+ years in pharmaceutical R&D, quality assurance, and pharmacovigilance auditing. Former MHRA Senior Pharmacovigilance Scientist and J&J Global System QA Program Manager. MSc Clinical Pharmacology, co-author of the RQA PV Auditing Handbook.

cta.heading: Ready to Work With Our Team?
cta.text: Connect with our pharmacovigilance experts and discover how PVCON can support your regulatory compliance and drug safety operations.
